Secure your mission with Microsoft

Protect your organization with security offerings that assess risk, provide monitoring and notification, and training.
Free security assessment Watch video

Security Program for Nonprofits

Secure your people, data, and AI—end to end. The Security Program for Nonprofits provides you with everything you need to protect identities, devices, information, and apps so you can use AI with confidence and stay focused on your mission.
Watch webinar

Free security assessment

Evaluate security risks across your digital estate and get a prioritized action plan to secure your organization end-to-end.
Free security assessment

Nonprofit offers

Eligible nonprofits get discounted pricing across Microsoft’s security portfolio. Equip your staff with the right protections—from identity and endpoint security to data governance and threat detection.
Learn more Get started

AccountGuard

AccountGuard is free for eligible nonprofits and provides an extra layer of protection with nation-state threat notifications.
Get started

Security Advisors program

Join a community of experienced security practitioners from around the world and connect directly with Microsoft security engineers through private previews, feedback and community collaboration.
Sign up

Security training

Discover security training opportunities tailored for nonprofits. Learn how to protect your organization and use AI responsibly including best practices and real-world scenarios.
Learn more

Featured nonprofit offers

Threat Protection

Microsoft Defender Suite for Microsoft 365 Business Premium is now available at a 60% discount for eligible nonprofits.

Get started

Data Security

Microsoft Purview Suite for Microsoft 365 Business Premium is now available at a 60% discount for eligible nonprofits.

Get started

End-to-End Security

Microsoft Defender and Purview Suites for Microsoft 365 Business Premium are available together as a complete security offering at a 60% discount for eligible nonprofits.

Get started

Resources

Security events for nonprofits

Learn how Microsoft Security solutions can protect sensitive data, build trust, and provide rapid responses to cyberthreats, including risk assessments, proactive monitoring, and training.
Browse events

Program guide

This program guide breaks down the five components of the Security Program for Nonprofits and how to get started.
Get the guide

Security webinar

Get detailed insight into the Security Program for Nonprofits including the free security assessment, product demos, nonprofit offers, and more.
Watch webinar

Microsoft Digital Defense Report 2025

Learn about the foundations and new frontiers of cybersecurity.
Get the report

Skilling

Intro to Cybersecurity

In this learning path you will learn about cybersecurity concepts and ways to protect yourself and your nonprofit organization from cyberattacks.
Start learning path

AI Security Fundamentals

This learning path helps you understand the basic concepts of AI security, the types of security controls that apply to AI systems, and the security testing procedures that you can implement in AI systems to increase the security posture of AI environments.
Start learning path

Security Virtual Training Days

Build technical skills, knowledge, and insights to protect your organization from modern cyberthreats. Explore free, in-depth training from Microsoft Learn to learn how to detect threats, help keep hybrid clouds secure, safeguard information, and manage your digital security needs.
Explore training sessions

Customer stories

Slide %{start} of %{total}. %{slideTitle}
Skip pretext Sneak Peek slideshow: navigate using the slide tabs Skip post text

Life Without Barriers

Life Without Barriers boosts data security, empowers human services with Defender, Purview, and Entra ID.

Learn about Life Without Barriers

Goodwill Industries of the Valleys

Goodwill Industries of the Valleys battles poverty by empowering staff through technology.

Learn about Goodwill Industries of the Valleys

Cancer Council NSW

To better meet the needs of Australians fighting cancer and to prevent disease in the future, Cancer Council NSW upgraded its technology. The organization worked with Microsoft partner cubesys to strengthen its security posture and better manage employee devices. Now, Cancer Council NSW has the confidence its teams can better support people in the field securely.

Learn about Cancer Council NSW

Joris Zorg

Dutch elder healthcare nonprofit Joris Zorg experienced a hack of an on-premise server in 2022. The attack accelerated its ongoing move to the cloud and led the organization to work with Microsoft partner Wortell to strengthen its security stance. Now, Wortell’s managed detection and response services with Microsoft Defender repel cyberattacks and protect personally identifiable information.

Learn about Joris Zorg

International Center for Journalists

The International Center for Journalists (ICFJ) supports reporters, editors, and newsrooms across the world, especially in places where it is dangerous to pursue independent journalism. To better protect members of the press and their own staff, ICFJ works with FSi Strategies to deploy Microsoft Defender. The industry-leading security solution gives staff and journalists the confidence to engage candidly, building a stronger network of journalism worldwide.

Learn about International Center for Journalists

Nonprofit offers

Power your organization with technology grants and discounts for nonprofits. Register and confirm your organization’s eligibility to access Microsoft nonprofit offers.
Learn more Get started

Contact us

Microsoft representatives can help you find the right products for your organization and address inquiries related to eligibility and technical support.
Contact us

Engage a Microsoft partner

Our partners make it their mission to help accelerate your mission. These select Microsoft 365 partners are ready to help you get started.
Find a partner

Microsoft Elevate for Changemakers

Become an AI champion for your team through credentials, a global peer community, training and resources to help build capacity for responsible AI adoption and greater impact.
Get started today
